wine_hotels.name: Byblos Art Hotel Villa Amista
wine_hotels.address: Via Cedrare 78, 37029 Corrubbio di San Pietro in Cariano (VR), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: 15th-century Wine Cellar Bar with 1,600+ selected labels; Michelin-starred Amista Restaurant (6 consecutive stars); Saor traditional restaurant; wine tastings in historic cellar
wine_hotels.description: Design hotel in a 15th-century Palladian-style aristocratic villa in the Valpolicella hills. The Wine Cellar Bar houses 1,600+ labels for tastings. The Amista Restaurant holds 1 Michelin Star across 6 consecutive years. ESPACE Byblos spa. Part of Small Luxury Hotels of the World.
wine_hotels.tip: The Wine Cellar Bar is open to non-guests for tasting - no hotel booking required.

verified.address_quoted: Via Cedrare 78 - 37029, Corrubbio di San Pietro in Cariano Verona, Italy

wine_hotels.name: Villa Cordevigo Wine Relais
wine_hotels.address: Localita Cordevigo snc, 37010 Cavaion Veronese (VR), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate wines from Vigneti Villabella (Garda DOC, Valpolicella DOC); Oseleta 1 Michelin Star restaurant; welcome aperitif; 4-course tasting menu with estate wine pairings
wine_hotels.description: 5-star Wine Relais in the Cavaion Veronese hills surrounded by vineyards and olive groves. Estate wines from the Villabella vineyard anchor the Oseleta Michelin-starred restaurant's list. Welcome aperitif, tasting menus, and wine and history packages for guests.
wine_hotels.tip: The wine and history tasting package (estate wines + guided cellar narrative) is the most educational offering and can be booked without an overnight stay.

wine_hotels.name: Massimago Wine Relais
wine_hotels.address: Via Giare 21, 37030 Mezzane di Sotto (VR), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: Massimago organic estate wines; Amarone, Ripasso, Valpolicella; vineyard walk and cellar visit for guests; cooking school; yoga; on-site restaurant with home-grown produce
wine_hotels.wine_classification: Valpolicella DOC / Amarone della Valpolicella DOCG
wine_hotels.description: Boutique organic wine relais in the Mezzane Valley, 20 minutes from Verona. Six rooms and two apartments with pool and spa exclusively for guests. Estate winery produces organic Amarone and Valpolicella; vineyard walks, cellar tastings, and a seasonal restaurant are all included.
wine_hotels.tip: The combined cooking school + wine pairing session (available as an add-on) pairs Veneto classic dishes with estate wines - highly rated by guests.

verified.address_quoted: Via Giare, 21 37030 Mezzane di Sotto VR

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Villa Giona
wine_hotels.address: Via Vito Pasetto 8, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano (VR), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: 4-star hotel in the heart of Valpolicella; 10 km from Verona; vineyard-country setting; positioned for estate visits across Valpolicella Classico zone
wine_hotels.description: 4-star hotel in a 15th-century villa in San Pietro in Cariano at the heart of Valpolicella Classica. Built by the Giona family of Veronese Jewish origin and expanded in the 16th century. Ideal base for estate visits across Valpolicella, Amarone, and Soave wine zones. 30-minute drive to Lake Garda.
wine_hotels.tip: The hotel's position at the centre of the Valpolicella Classico DOC zone makes it the best strategic base for visiting multiple producers in a day.

verified.address_quoted: Via Vito Pasetto, 8 Verona - San Pietro in Cariano Veneto 37029 Italy

wine_hotels.name: Villa della Torre Allegrini Wine and Art Relais
wine_hotels.address: Via della Torre 25, 37022 Fumane di Valpolicella (VR), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: Allegrini estate wines at the property; La Poja, Amarone, Valpolicella Classico; Renaissance palace private events and tasting experiences; luxury B&B
wine_hotels.description: Renaissance palace designed 1440s-1562, purchased by Marilisa Allegrini in 2008. Serves as Allegrini's luxury B&B and event venue. 11 rooms in the historic palace amid Fumane di Valpolicella vineyards. Private wine events featuring Allegrini Amarone and La Poja monovarietal Corvina.
wine_hotels.tip: Stays at Villa della Torre include privileged access to Allegrini estate tastings not available to day visitors.

verified.address_quoted: Via della Torre 25, 37022 Fumane di Valpolicella (VR)

wine_hotels.name: Tenuta Le Cave Wine Relais
wine_hotels.wine_program: Organic and biodynamic estate wines (Valpolicella, Ripasso, Amarone); wine lovers packages; vineyard walking paths; organic production
wine_hotels.description: Organic and biodynamic wine relais on a panoramic terrace between Valpolicella and Soave. Estate produces organic Valpolicella, Ripasso, and Amarone. Wine lovers packages include guided vineyard walks, cellar visits, and discovery tastings of organic wines. Pool and spa available.
wine_hotels.tip: Tenuta Le Cave's biodynamic Amarone is one of the rarest expressions of the appellation - the cellar visit is included in the Wine Lovers package.

wine_hotels.name: Alice Relais nelle Vigne
wine_hotels.address: Via Giardino 94, Localita Carpesica, 31029 Vittorio Veneto (TV), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: Le Vigne di Alice estate Prosecco DOCG; Bellenda 1986 tastings; 19th-century farmhouse surrounded by vineyards; themed Alice in Wonderland rooms
wine_hotels.description: Vineyard relais of Le Vigne di Alice winery on a hilltop in Carpesica between Conegliano and Vittorio Veneto in the UNESCO Prosecco hills. 19th-century farmhouse with themed Alice in Wonderland rooms. Estate organic Prosecco DOCG tastings; 60 km north of Venice.
wine_hotels.tip: The Doro Nature brut-zero Prosecco from Le Vigne di Alice is among the most serious expressions of the DOCG - ask for it at breakfast.

verified.address_quoted: Via Giardino 94, Loc. Carpesica 31029 Vittorio Veneto, Treviso

wine_hotels.name: Romantik Relais d'Arfanta
wine_hotels.wine_program: Own-production Prosecco DOCG; bottle and olive oil at breakfast; attached winery; along the Prosecco wine road; 15 min from Conegliano, 60 min from Venice
wine_hotels.description: Elegantly restored country-house hotel in the UNESCO Prosecco hills between Conegliano and Valdobbiadene. 7 rooms (3 suites, 4 standard) in a peaceful vine-surrounded estate with pool, garden, and spa. Own Prosecco DOCG and olive oil at breakfast; attached winery available for tastings. Tel +39 0438 933861.
wine_hotels.tip: The attached winery offers horizontal tastings of the estate's cru Prosecco bottles - arrange a session at the front desk on arrival.

wine_hotels.name: Agriturismo Vedova
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Prosecco Superiore DOCG wines; country-chic agriturismo surrounded by UNESCO-listed Prosecco hills; regional Venetian cuisine with estate wines
wine_hotels.description: Country-chic agriturismo in Valdobbiadene with interiors designed by architect Tobia Scarpa. Surrounded by the UNESCO-listed Prosecco hills. Own-estate Prosecco Superiore DOCG; regional Venetian cuisine. Highly rated for value and charm. Tel available via agriturismovedova.it.
wine_hotels.tip: The Scarpa-designed interiors are notable for a farmhouse - the blend of agricultural heritage and contemporary design is intentional.

wine_hotels.name: Tenuta Santa Maria Valverde
wine_hotels.address: Localita Gazzo 4, 37020 Marano di Valpolicella (VR), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: Boutique winery; Amarone, Valpolicella, Ripasso; e-bike vineyard tours with wine tasting; 17th-century cellar; rural house stays
wine_hotels.wine_classification: Valpolicella Classica DOC / Amarone della Valpolicella DOCG
wine_hotels.description: Boutique winery in Marano di Valpolicella with farm-stay accommodation in the rural house. The estate operates the Bike Station Valpolicella, offering e-bike tours (2 h, 5 km) through the vineyards with Amarone tasting. 17th-century cellar for wine refinement. Rated 4.8/5 on TripAdvisor (124 reviews).
wine_hotels.tip: The e-bike + tasting combination (approx. EUR65) is the most immersive Valpolicella Classico estate experience available at this price point.

verified.address_quoted: Localita Gazzo, 4, 37020 Marano di Valpolicella VR

wine_hotels.name: Relais La Magioca
wine_hotels.address: Via Moron 3, 37024 Negrar di Valpolicella (VR), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: Valpolicella Classica DOC and Amarone DOCG estate wines; boutique relais in Negrar sub-zone; cellar tastings available; agriturismo-style estate dining
wine_hotels.wine_classification: Valpolicella Classica DOC / Amarone della Valpolicella DOCG
wine_hotels.description: Small boutique relais in Negrar di Valpolicella, one of the five communes of the Classico zone. Estate-produced Valpolicella Classico and Amarone. Cellar tastings by arrangement. Agriturismo-style dining with local Veronese produce paired with estate wines.
wine_hotels.tip: Negrar is the easternmost of the five Valpolicella Classico communes - the wines here tend toward elegance rather than the richer style of Fumane and Marano.

wine_hotels.name: La Foresteria Serego Alighieri
wine_hotels.address: Via Stazione 2, 37020 Gargagnago di Valpolicella (VR), Italy
wine_hotels.wine_program: Serego Alighieri estate wines by Masi (Dante Alighieri's heirs); Vaio Armaron Amarone; Possessioni range; private cellar tours; Monteleone21 open winery nearby
wine_hotels.wine_classification: Valpolicella Classica DOC / Amarone della Valpolicella DOCG
wine_hotels.description: The Serego Alighieri family (descendants of Dante Alighieri) has farmed this Valpolicella estate since 1353. La Foresteria guest house at Gargagnago offers estate stays with access to Masi-managed wine tastings of the Serego Alighieri range including Vaio Armaron Amarone. Linked to the new Monteleone21 open winery.
wine_hotels.tip: The historical connection to Dante Alighieri's family and the 700-year vine lineage make this the most literature-linked wine stay in Veneto.
